hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "main" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "HEAD" ]; then echo "Auto-mergar $BRANCH -> main..."; git checkout main && git merge --ff-only "$BRANCH" && git push origin main && git checkout "$BRANCH" && echo '{"systemMessage": "Mergad till main och pushad."}'; fi
